days.text: Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few thundery showers later. Force 4 to 5 north to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
